name: Green Chile Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2 Cans green chilies, chopped and drained
1 Pound cheese, 4 Cups grated (half Cheddar, half Jack or Swiss)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread pastry in a 9 x 13-inch pan or 2 quiche pans.
2. Spread chilies over the pastry.
3. In a bowl, combine cheese, flour, salt, and pepper.
4. Beat eggs and milk together in another bowl.
5. Pour the egg and milk mixture over the chilies.
6. Bake at 325 degrees for 40 to 45 minutes, until the center is set.
